hero.subtitle: Engineer and PhD specializing in the design and development of data-driven digital systems. Experienced across the full application lifecycle, from data modeling and backend services to interface development and production deployment. Focused on turning complex data challenges into scalable and reliable technical solutions that support both research and operational teams.

about.p1: Working on projects across several countries has shaped the way I approach engineering challenges: listening first, understanding the context, and collaborating with teams from diverse cultural and professional backgrounds.
about.p2: I believe the best software is the kind that genuinely simplifies people’s work and frees up time for what truly matters.
about.p3: This belief guides both my technical decisions and the way I collaborate with product and business teams.

projects.meta_desc: Projects and achievements in full-stack development, data engineering and DevOps.

blog.meta_desc: Articles on development, data engineering and web technologies.

travel.desc: Working across different cultures has taught me to communicate with precision, adapt quickly, and design universal solutions in very different contexts.

contact.desc: Open to freelance opportunities and technical collaborations. Please feel free to contact me to discuss further.
